senses.definition: used to suggest that the dreams one has in the early morning hours may predict future events

examples.x: I had a dream this morning that I won the lottery, and as they say, morning dreams come true, so I'm feeling lucky today.

senses.definition: used to suggest that the opposite of what one dreams about may happen in reality

examples.x: She didn't let her bad dream get her down, knowing that dreams go by contraries and that it probably meant something positive was on the horizon.

word_list.word: dream of a funeral and you hear of a marriage

senses.definition: used to imply that dreaming of a funeral can signal a positive event like a wedding, suggesting that negative dreams can have positive outcomes

examples.x: After having a dream about attending a funeral, my friend recalled the old saying dream of a funeral and you hear of a marriage, and wondered if it was a sign of good news to come.

senses.definition: used to suggest that the children that are born in May are more vulnerable to illness or health issues

examples.x: My grandmother always warned me not to have a child in May, as she believed they would be frail and delicate - she used to say May chickens come cheeping.

senses.definition: used to refer to the traditional belief that a clear moonlit sky is often associated with the prediction of frost or cold weather in the near future
